title: 5 Habits a Godly Man Kills Before They Kill Him
caption:
Some habits don't look dangerous. They just look small, right up until they've quietly killed a year.

The snoozed alarm. The scroll before the prayer. The rest that's really avoidance. The joke that covers the wound. The comparison you've been calling ambition.

None of them announce themselves. They just cost you the same hour, every day, until it's a decade.

Kill the small thing before it kills something bigger.

Save this and pick the one you're actually doing.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #selfcontrol #brotherhood
